name: Spinach and Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh spinach, washed and dried, torn into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the spinach in a salad bowl or on a serving platter.
2. Add the red onion and mushrooms.
3. Whisk together the mustard and vinegar in a small bowl.
4. Slowly whisk in the oil until combined.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Just before serving, toss the spinach, onions, and mushrooms with some of the dressing, adding more as needed to coat the leaves evenly.
7. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon on top.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
